import React from 'react' import classes from './Contact.module.css'; import contact from '../../Assets/contact.jpg'; import visit from '../../Assets/visit.png'; import phone from '../../Assets/phone.png'; import mail from '../../Assets/mail.png'; const Cont = () => { return (

Get In Touch

Contact Us

Need an Expert?you are more than welcome to leave

Your contact info and we will be in touch shortly























Visit Us

S. NO. 38/1, KHEDEKAR INDUSTRIAL

ESTATE, BEHIND PARI CO.,

NARHEGAON, PUNE -411041

Call Us

+919850089067

+919850089065

Message Us

sachintoolsengg@gmail.com

sachintoolsengg@yahoo.co.in

) } export default Cont;
